plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Glean uses your location to pin where your materials are, so nearby buyers can find them.

plugins.photosPermission: Glean needs access to your photos so you can add pictures to listings and posts.
plugins.cameraPermission: Glean needs access to your camera so you can take photos of your materials.

plugins.calendarPermission: Glean adds collection drives and events to your calendar so you don't miss a pickup.

plugins.contactsPermission: Glean uses your contacts so you can invite people to join.

plugins.photosPermission: Glean saves listing photos to your gallery.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Glean saves listing photos to your gallery.
